title: helianthemum italicum f. alpestris
intro: Helianthemum italicum f. alpestris, also known as the Italian rockrose, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Cistaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, to treat various ailments such as wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The plant's health benefits also extend to its potential in reducing stress, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Helianthemum italicum f. alpestris include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
